mapper.insert: insert into user_verification_code( target, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, consumed_at, create_time ) values ( #{target}, #{purpose}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{consumedAt}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select id, target, purpose, code_hash as codeHash, expires_at as expiresAt, consumed_at as consumedAt, create_time as createTime from user_verification_code where target = #{target} and purpose = #{purpose} and consumed_at is null and expires_at > #{now} order by id desc limit 1
